body:
Gallup Engineering
     Hey! I'm Max Gallup, currently pursuing a Master in Computer Security at VU Amsterdam. I'm also co-running a platform that offers bachelor students a final year project in the field of autonomous driving (read more). On top of that, I also offer freelance software development, specializing in the fields of: 
    
        Systems Programming
        Integrations & Automation
        System Administration & Infrastructure
        Security Analysis 
    
    Additionally, I have some experience with designing and building drones and offer the following engineering services:
    
        3D Design & Printing
        Manufacturing & Assembly
        SMD Soldering
        Embedded Security Analysis
    
    Motivation
    Why bother with all of this? Why security?
    A more detailed answer to this question can be found in a blog post of mine. However, the short version is as follows: I believe that systems need to be built with security as a top priority from the ground up and intentionally setting the requirements to allow security to be prioritized in this way. It's important to align the business context with the expectations of delivering safe and secure systems to begin with. For this reason, I offer services exclusively in a setting where high expectations towards security and quality are the norm.

title: The ASE Rover: an Educational Platform for Hands-on Projects in Computer Systems
